summary: Comprehensive testing of Inspection Q&A feature (Iteration 56). All features verified as working: Services page has two tabs (Inspection Packages, Inspection Q&A), Q&A page shows stats cards (Total Questions, Active Questions, Categories), table has correct columns (Question, Answer, Sub-Question 1, Answer, Sub-Question 2, Answer, Actions), Add Question modal with category selector and 3 answer types (Multiple Choice, Photo Upload, Video Upload 45s max), Sub-Questions 1 & 2 are optional. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All CRUD operations working (Create, Edit, Toggle, Delete).
critical_code_review_comments: All Inspection Q&A features implemented correctly
Services page has two tabs: Inspection Packages and Inspection Q&A
Stats cards show Total Questions, Active Questions, Categories counts
Table columns: Question, Answer, Sub-Question 1, Answer, Sub-Question 2, Answer, Actions
Add Question modal has category selector with 10 predefined categories
Answer Type selector shows 3 options: Multiple Choice, Photo Upload, Video Upload (45s max)
Multiple Choice allows adding options and selecting correct answer
Sub-Question 1 and Sub-Question 2 sections are optional
Edit, Toggle (active/inactive), and Delete actions work correctly
Toast notifications show for create, update, and delete operations
4 sample questions pre-created with various answer types and sub-questions
seed_data_creation: 4 sample questions pre-created: Engine Health (multiple choice + sub-questions with video), Exterior Body (photo + sub-question multiple choice), Tyres & Wheels (multiple choice + photo sub-question), Brakes (video + multiple choice sub-question)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inspection Q&A feature fully tested and verified. Features: 1) Services page with two tabs (Inspection Packages, Inspection Q&A), 2) Stats cards showing question counts, 3) Table with 7 columns including sub-questions, 4) Add Question modal with category selector and 3 answer types, 5) Optional Sub-Question 1 and Sub-Question 2 sections, 6) CRUD operations (Create, Edit, Toggle active/inactive, Delete) all working. Backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/inspection-qa/questions, PATCH /api/inspection-qa/questions/{id}/toggle, GET /api/inspection-qa/categories.

backend_apis.GET /api/inspection-qa/questions: PASS - Returns all questions with filtering by category_id and is_active
backend_apis.GET /api/inspection-qa/questions/{id}: PASS - Returns single question by ID
backend_apis.POST /api/inspection-qa/questions: PASS - Creates new question with all answer types and sub-questions
backend_apis.GET /api/inspection-qa/categories: PASS - Returns categories with question counts

frontend_ui.Services_Page_Tabs: PASS - Two tabs: Inspection Packages and Inspection Q&A
frontend_ui.Stats_Cards: PASS - Total Questions, Active Questions, Categories
frontend_ui.Table_Columns: PASS - Question, Answer, Sub-Question 1, Answer, Sub-Question 2, Answer, Actions
frontend_ui.Answer_Type_Options: PASS - Multiple Choice, Photo Upload, Video Upload (45s max)
frontend_ui.Multiple_Choice_Options: PASS - Add options and select correct answer
frontend_ui.Sub_Questions_Optional: PASS - Sub-Question 1 and Sub-Question 2 marked as Optional
frontend_ui.Edit_Action: PASS - Opens edit modal with pre-filled data
frontend_ui.Toast_Notifications: PASS - Shows success messages for CRUD operations
